message:
feat(tui): add status bar discoverability for effects, high-contrast, and theme (br-1xt0m.1.12.1)

Expose missing state toggles in the status strip:
- [fx off] indicator when effects are disabled (High priority)
- [hc] in accessibility tags when high-contrast mode is on
- Theme name as a Low-priority right-aligned segment
- Refactored a11y indicator from 2-tuple match to dynamic tag builder

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
